title: Getting Started with AtlusDeck
description: Learn how to sign in, navigate the dashboard, explore your deals pipeline, view deal details, and configure your settings.

steps.narration: Welcome to AtlusDeck! Let me show you around. This is your command center -- the dashboard gives you a quick overview of your active deals, recent activity, and actions that need your attention.

callout.text: Start on the dashboard for your active pipeline snapshot.

steps.narration: Now let's explore the deals pipeline. Here you can see all your active deals organized by status. Each card shows the company name, deal value, and current stage. We'll cover deal creation in detail in another tutorial.
Click on a deal to see its full details. The deal view shows you everything about this opportunity -- the company, your contacts, the proposal timeline, and all generated assets.
Notice the activity timeline on this page. It tracks every interaction with the deal -- from initial research to deck generation. You'll see status updates for each workflow step.
Let's check out the template library. Templates are the building blocks for your proposal decks. You can connect Google Slides templates and AtlusDeck will analyze their structure.

callout.text: Connect your Google Slides templates here.

steps.narration: Now let's look at your settings. This is where you manage your deck structures for each touch type, configure integrations, set your Drive folder, and manage your agents.
The integrations page lets you connect your Google Drive and other services. Once connected, AtlusDeck can automatically store generated decks in your Drive.
You're all set to explore! Try creating a deal or browsing templates. There's plenty more to discover -- each section of AtlusDeck is designed to help you generate winning proposals faster.
